mapper.select: select listing_id, seller_user_id, title, description, unit_price, delivery_mode, stock_mode, stock_total, stock_available, min_purchase_quantity, max_purchase_quantity, status, create_time, update_time from virtual_listing where listing_id = #{listingId}

select listing_id, seller_user_id, title, description, unit_price, delivery_mode, stock_mode, stock_total, stock_available, min_purchase_quantity, max_purchase_quantity, status, create_time, update_time from virtual_listing where listing_id = #{listingId} for update

select listing_id, seller_user_id, title, description, unit_price, delivery_mode, stock_mode, stock_total, stock_available, min_purchase_quantity, max_purchase_quantity, status, create_time, update_time from virtual_listing where seller_user_id = #{sellerUserId} order by listing_id desc
